summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pro AV Tech landing page. Backend API mostly functional with minor validation issues. Frontend UI working well with successful form submission and navigation.

validation_bugs.issue: Email validation not enforced - accepts invalid email formats
validation_bugs.impact: Allows invalid email addresses to be stored

validation_bugs.issue: Required field validation not enforced - accepts empty strings for name and event_type

status_code_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful creation

validation_issues.issue: Frontend form validation not working - no error toast shown for empty required fields

minor_display_issues.issue: Hero heading text spacing - 'Precision EventTechnology' missing space

passed_tests: Hero section displays with correct background and CTAs
Services section shows 6 service cards in bento grid
Portfolio section shows 6 items with hover effects
Contact form accepts valid input and submits successfully
Toast notifications appear on successful form submission
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix backend validation (email format and required fields) and frontend form validation error handling. Minor: fix hero heading spacing and HTTP status codes.
